calendar.matters: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Report Of Status With A Petition Requesting Additional Time For Estate Administration Must Be Filed At Least Two Weeks Before That Status Date. Appearance Will Be Required On Nov-10-2026 If No Petition Has Been Filed.

REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Mar-18-2026 Granted Per Written Order

REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Feb-10-2026 Continued To Mar-18-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Nov-04-2025 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Oct-30-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (in person):
Deb Kinney, Esq., for Ignatius Bau, Petitioner.

At the court's query, counsel addresses the notice issue. The court requests counsel to affirm on the record that they believe that all interested parties have been properly served with notice of this action. Counsel affirms. The court waives defective notice on the record. The Petition for Letters of Administration is granted by the court. A Status hearing will be set for 11/4/2025. The administrator must file either a petition for final distribution or a report of status with a petition seeking additional time for estate administration two weeks before 11/4/2025. Karen Ann Simons is appointed Probate Referee. ***Order signed after hearing.

Judge: Hon. Lydia Villarreal. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Espin. Not Reported.
